title: Your Stakes
description: Manage your staked ICP neurons and their configurations

empty.title: No neurons yet
empty.description: Create your first neuron to start earning voting rewards and participating in governance

setDissolveDelayModal.title: Set dissolve delay for #{{neuronId}}
setDissolveDelayModal.description: Dissolve delay is the minimum amount of time you have to wait for the neuron to unlock, and ICP to be available again. Note, that dissolve delay only decreases when the neuron is in a dissolving state.
setDissolveDelayModal.hint: Minimum {{min}} days to have voting power, maximum {{max}} days.
setDissolveDelayModal.success: You have successfully set a dissolve delay of {{amount}} days.

errors.decreasingDelay: The dissolve delay cannot be decreased.

errors.zeroBalance: You need ICP to stake. Please buy or deposit ICP first.
